Who I am

About Me

I'm a young entrepreneur and developer from Nurafshon, Tashkent region, Uzbekistan. I built my foundation in computers and coding at school, competed nationally in Zakovat, served as class leader, and worked as a digital media administrator at Nurafshon City Government while still in college. I competed in MMA at city championship level, participated in ICT Week Uzbekistan, and volunteered at civic events. Today I channel everything into AgroSmart — a startup solving real market problems for Uzbekistan's farming communities.

What I Built

Projects

AgroSmart
Active

An agricultural marketplace connecting Uzbek farmers directly with buyers and wholesalers. Built to eliminate price opacity, cut produce waste, and fix logistics for Uzbekistan's ~5 million farmers.

Real-time market prices
AI price suggestions
Buyer–farmer matching
3 role-based dashboards
Reduces agricultural waste
Target: 5M+ farmers
